name: Climb Fit XR : Climbing Fitness Cardio

reviews.review_title: Thought it was sketchy, proved right.
reviews.review_description: Disregard the "free" price tag on the store, this is just a free trial in disguise. Not to mention the use of AI instead of human voice actors. It's hard to say how much of this game was even programmed by a human.
This game is very fun and i think it really helps with fittness and weight loss, im happy i found this game
Only get mediocre work for the game, only get 2 FREE trys a day and after that you can purchase there plan for $987654321, a month
Even though it says fit it is not a fitness thing it is good enough to be a full game. when I say it is not a fitness thing I mean it is not really boring it does keep track of cal,s lost

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the review, Lewis! 🧗‍♂️ Really glad you're having fun!



That's exactly what we aimed for — a game that's genuinely enjoyable to play, where tracking your calories and staying active feels like a natural part of the experience rather than a chore. Love that you picked up on that!



We're still in Early Access and there's a lot more coming — new content, features, and improvements are on the way. We can't wait to show you what's next. Stay with us!🔥

reviews.review_description:
I love it great game but why every TWO DAYUM SECONDS it says "please step back" EVEN THO I CANT
L GAME

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback.
 We’ve updated Climb Fit XR so getting close to the wall no longer darkens your view or interrupts the climb with the “please step back” message. 
We’re glad you enjoy the game, and we hope you jump back in and enjoy the climb again. We’ll keep working to make Climb Fit XR even more fun!

reviews.review_description: I joined the first time and it kept asking me for a free trial￼ and I couldn’t play
Its a complete cash grab dont get it
